title: Graham Hancock found his grandfather’s name on the pyramid!
summary: Graham Hancock shares a personal story about discovering his grandfather's name carved on the Great Pyramid, dated April 5th, 1916, which he later confirmed through his grandfather's diaries.

events.description: Philip Hancock (Graham Hancock's grandfather) climbed the Great Pyramid on April 5th and carved his name on it

key_claims.claim: Graham Hancock has climbed the Great Pyramid five times, two of which were legal
Graham Hancock found the inscription 'P Hancock 5th of April 1916' carved near the top of the Great Pyramid
Philip Hancock's diary entry for April 5th, 1916 confirmed he climbed the Great Pyramid that day
